/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/SmartDeskClock.dir/SmartDeskClock_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SmartDeskClock.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SmartDeskClock.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SmartDeskClock.dir/clockwidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SmartDeskClock.dir/weatherwidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SmartDeskClock.dir/aiquoteservice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SmartDeskClock.dir/configmanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SmartDeskClock.dir/emotionanalyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SmartDeskClock.dir/aivisualengine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SmartDeskClock.dir/x11globalshortcut.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SmartDeskClock.dir/todoitem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SmartDeskClock.dir/todowidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SmartDeskClock.dir/addtododialog.cpp.o -o SmartDeskClock  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSM.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libICE.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXext.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libxcb.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2
